sentences.target: Mi vecino es famoso en el barrio.
sentences.reading: /mi beˈsino es faˈmoso en el ˈbarjo/

translations.es: Mi vecino es famoso en el barrio.
translations.ipa: /mi beˈsino es faˈmoso en el ˈbarjo/
translations.en: My neighbor is famous in the neighborhood.
translations.fr: Mon voisin est célèbre dans le quartier.
translations.de: Mein Nachbar ist im Viertel berühmt.
translations.it: Il mio vicino è famoso nel quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的邻居在社区里很有名。
translations.yue: 我嘅鄰居喺附近好出名。
translations.pt: Meu vizinho é famoso no bairro.
translations.vi: Người hàng xóm của tôi nổi tiếng trong khu phố.
translations.nl: Mijn buurman is beroemd in de buurt.
translations.hi: मेरा पड़ोसी मोहल्ले में मशहूर है।
translations.pl: Mój sąsiad jest sławny w okolicy.
translations.el: Ο γείτονάς μου είναι διάσημος στη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Naboen min er مشهور i nabolaget.
translations.id: Tetangga saya terkenal di lingkungan ini.
translations.sv: Min granne är berömd i grannskapet.
translations.ro: Vecinul meu este celebru în cartier.
translations.cs: Můj soused je v sousedství slavný.
translations.da: Min nabo er berømt i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 私の隣人は近所で有名です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with the noun in gender/number contextually; modifies 'vecino'.
Common noun, masculine singular, head of the noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary verb in present indicative, linking subject and predicate adjective.
Adjective in masculine singular, predicate complement describing 'vecino'.
Preposition introducing a prepositional phrase of location.
Definite article, masculine singular, modifies 'barrio'.
Common noun, masculine singular, object of the preposition 'en'.

translations.zh-Hans: 我认识一位有名的歌手。
translations.vi: Tôi biết một ca sĩ nổi tiếng.
translations.hi: मैं एक मशहूर गायक को जानता हूँ।
translations.ja: 私は有名な歌手を知っています。

tokens.explanation: Finite main verb, first person singular present indicative.
Preposition marking the direct object with a human/animate noun phrase.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, modifies 'cantante'.
Common noun; in this context the direct object of the verb phrase.
Adjective in masculine singular, attributive modifier of 'cantante'.

sentences.target: La fiesta fue famosa en la escuela.
sentences.reading: /la ˈfjesta fue faˈmosa en la esˈkwela/

translations.es: La fiesta fue famosa en la escuela.
translations.ipa: /la ˈfjesta fue faˈmosa en la esˈkwela/
translations.en: The party was famous at school.
translations.fr: La fête était célèbre à l'école.
translations.de: Die Party war in der Schule berühmt.
translations.it: La festa era famosa a scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 那场派对在学校里很有名。
translations.yue: 嗰個派對喺學校好出名。
translations.pt: A festa foi famosa na escola.
translations.vi: Bữa tiệc đã nổi tiếng ở trường.
translations.nl: Het feest was beroemd op school.
translations.hu: A buli híres volt az iskolában.
translations.el: Το πάρτι ήταν διάσημο στο σχολείο.
translations.ro: Petrecerea a fost celebră la școală.
translations.ja: そのパーティーは学校で有名でした。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular, modifies 'fiesta'.
Common noun, feminine singular, subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary verb, preterite indicative, linking subject and predicate adjective.
Adjective in feminine singular, predicate complement describing 'fiesta'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, modifies 'escuela'.
Common noun, feminine singular, object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Ese restaurante es famoso por su sopa.
sentences.reading: /ˈese restauˈɾante es faˈmoso poɾ su ˈsopa/

translations.es: Ese restaurante es famoso por su sopa.
translations.ipa: /ˈese restauˈɾante es faˈmoso poɾ su ˈsopa/
translations.en: That restaurant is famous for its soup.
translations.fr: Ce restaurant est célèbre pour sa soupe.
translations.de: Dieses Restaurant ist für seine Suppe berühmt.
translations.it: Quel ristorante è famoso per la sua zuppa.
translations.zh-Hans: 那家餐厅以它的汤闻名。
translations.yue: 嗰間餐廳因為佢哋嘅湯而出名。
translations.pt: Esse restaurante é famoso pela sua sopa.
translations.he: המסעדה ההיא מפורסמת בזכות המרק שלה.
translations.vi: Nhà hàng đó nổi tiếng vì món súp của họ.
translations.nl: Dat restaurant is beroemd om zijn soep.
translations.hu: Az az étterem a leveséről híres.
translations.hi: वह रेस्तरां अपनी सूप के लिए मशहूर है।
translations.pl: Ta restauracja jest słynna z zupy.
translations.el: Αυτό το εστιατόριο είναι διάσημο για τη σούπα του.
translations.nb: Den restauranten er berømt for suppen sin.
translations.sv: Den restaurangen är berömd för sin soppa.
translations.ro: Restaurantul acela este celebru pentru supa lui.
translations.cs: Ta restaurace je pro svou polévku slavná.
translations.da: Den restaurant er berømt for sin suppe.
translations.ja: あのレストランはスープで有名です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifies 'restaurante'.
Common noun, masculine singular, subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary verb in present indicative, linking subject and predicate adjective.
Adjective in masculine singular, predicate complement describing 'restaurante'.
Preposition introducing the reason or cause for fame.
Possessive determiner, invariant in gender/number, modifies 'sopa'.
Common noun, feminine singular, object of the preposition 'por'.
